chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1145 of 2023 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.4765/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A 3. For orders on CMA No.4766/2024 (Ex/A) 4. For orders on CMA No.4767/2023 (S/A) 5. Counsel for the petitioner does not press the present Constitution Petition. Accordingly, same is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
